astralenchant.configuration.distortion_a: Allowed angle increase per Distortion level
Specifies how many degrees the allowed difference between the entity's facing direction and the player's line of sight increases for each level of Distortion.
astralenchant.configuration.enable_vanil: Enables recipes for vanilla items that may be required for game progression (such as bundles).
astralenchant.configuration.essence_of_e: Include Overload levels in Essence of Enchant total level calculation
Regardless of this setting, Overload levels are always applied to the level of Essence of Enchant itself.
Specifies how many percent the modifier multiplier increases for each increase of 1 in the total enchantment level.
astralenchant.configuration.instant_tele: Instant Teleport distance increase per level
Specifies how much the maximum teleportable distance increases for each level gained.
Specifies the maximum teleport distance provided by this enchantment.
astralenchant.configuration.last_stand_i: When disabled, Last Stand will not activate against damage that has the BYPASSES_INVULNERABILITY tag (such as /kill or void damage).
astralenchant.configuration.last_stand_r: Required experience points for Last Stand (base value)
The experience cost of Last Stand at level N is "base value ÷ N". By default, this is approximately 34 levels.
astralenchant.configuration.over_mending: Total experience points required for Over Mending
By default, this is approximately 166 levels. It is recommended that you set it to a multiple of 100.
astralenchant.configuration.title: Config
attribute.astralenchant.cooldown_duratio: Multiplier applied to item use cooldown duration
enchantment.astralenchant.adventurers_lo: Increases luck and the amount of experience gained from mobs and blocks based on the number of completed advancements.
Allows additional enchantments to be applied to internal items of a bundle with this enchantment while ignoring conflicts.
enchantment.astralenchant.cooldown_reduc: Reduces the cooldown of all items.
enchantment.astralenchant.curse_of_encha: Prevents enchantments on the item from being modified.
enchantment.astralenchant.curse_of_ignor: Replaces the tooltip with obscured text.
enchantment.astralenchant.distortion.des: Missed attacks distort toward a nearby target.
enchantment.astralenchant.endless_appeti: Enhances natural regeneration and directly heals based on the amount of excess hunger and hidden saturation beyond their caps.
enchantment.astralenchant.essence_of_enc: All item stats increase based on the total level of all enchantments other than this one.
All breakable blocks are collected as items. While sneaking, block states and components are preserved.
enchantment.astralenchant.instant_telepo: When using an Ender Pearl, teleports you to the point you are looking at. While sneaking, the teleport ray passes through a block and sends you to the opposite side of it.
No valid block exists within range!
enchantment.astralenchant.item_protectio: Disables the enchantment-disabling effect of the “Dispell” trait and the sealing effect of the “Ragnarok” trait added by L2Hostility.
enchantment.astralenchant.last_stand.des: Consumes experience points to avoid death.
enchantment.astralenchant.mitigation_pie: Attacks penetrate various forms of damage mitigation.
enchantment.astralenchant.momentum.desc: Negates movement speed reductions caused by item use or blocks.
enchantment.astralenchant.mystic_remnant: Killed mobs will occasionally drop enchanted books.
enchantment.astralenchant.over_mending.d: By consuming a large amount of experience points and being struck by lightning, the tool will become indestructible.
enchantment.astralenchant.over_mending.t: To complete Over Mending, you must be struck by lightning. Note: Lightning damage will be significantly increased.
enchantment.astralenchant.overload.desc: Grants Overload to the item, increasing the level of existing enchantments by the Overload value.
enchantment.astralenchant.reactive_armor: Negates effects that bypass armor and enchantments for certain types of damage.
enchantment.astralenchant.slot_expansion: Increases the number of accessory slots the item currently occupies by the enchantment level.
